title: CreateCraft
description:
This modpack contains all the necessary mods for the CreateCraft server.

This modpack contains:
Custom World Generation,
a lot of Create Mod addons.
All Farmers Delight addons
and a lot more...
body:
This modpack contains all the necessary mods for the CreateCraft server.

ModPack includes for example: 56 custom biomes, cooking, brewing,
Create Mod, furniture and a lot more! You will also find mods to optimize either the game or the server.

Mod List:
- Lets do brewery
- AzureLib
- BookShelf
- Collective
- Create Deco
- Create Interiors
- Create Steam n Rails
- Curios Api
- Dried Spice
- ModernFix
- No Enough Animations
- Plushies
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Sophisticated Core
- TipsyLib
- Lets do Api
- Alexs Delight
- Born In Chaos - (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
